---
title: "Build with us"
description: "Add a component, extend a workflow, or improve the docs."
order: 0
---

OpenPipeline is open source. Here is the path in.

| Step | What it covers |
|---|---|
| **Getting started** | Clone a package, install Viash, build components locally |
| **Project structure** | How namespaces, configs, and the `target/` build map together |
| **Creating components** | Write a `config.vsh.yaml` + script and wire up its container |
| **Creating pipelines** | Compose components into a VDSL3 Nextflow workflow |
| **Running tests** | Unit tests per component + integration tests with real data |
| **Pull requests** | Conventions, review, and how a release publishes docs automatically |

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Placeholder index — to be ported from the current `contributing/` section, split
by package where the workflow differs (e.g. GPU components in
`openpipeline_rapids`).
:::
